Experience Required: 3 – 5 Years Location: Kochi / Hybrid Employment Type: Full-Time

About the Role

We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Epicor Developer with strong ERP functional understanding and hands-on technical expertise in Epicor ERP customization and development. The ideal candidate should have experience collaborating with business users, understanding operational workflows, and implementing scalable ERP solutions aligned with business requirements.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop, customize, and maintain solutions within Epicor ERP.
  • Collaborate with functional teams and end users to understand business processes and requirements.
  • Perform customizations using:
  • BPM (Business Process Management)
  • BAQ (Business Activity Queries)
  • Dashboards
  • Data Directives
  • Method Directives
  • UI Customizations
  • SSRS Reports
  • Design integrations between Epicor ERP and external systems using APIs, REST services, and middleware.
  • Develop custom forms, reports, workflows, and automation.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve ERP-related technical and functional issues.
  • Support ERP upgrades, patching, testing, and deployment activities.
  • Optimize ERP performance and improve operational efficiency.
  • Participate in requirement gathering, solution design, estimation, and documentation.
  • Provide technical support and guidance to internal teams and end users.
  • Ensure coding standards, security, and best practices are followed.

Required Technical Skills

  • Epicor ERP Expertise:
  • Strong hands-on experience in Epicor ERP 10, BPM customization, BAQ development, dashboards, data views, Epicor functions, REST API integrations, SSRS reporting, form/screen customizations, Service Connect/integration concepts, data conversion/migration, Epicor security/user management, and workflow automation.
  • Programming Skills:
  • Strong expertise in C#
  • Good knowledge of .NET Framework / .NET Core, ASP.NET, SQL Server, LINQ, REST APIs, JSON/XML handling
  • Experience writing optimized SQL queries, stored procedures, and database troubleshooting.

Functional Knowledge Required

  • In-depth understanding of ERP functional workflows across modules:
  • Finance & Accounting
  • Procurement / Purchase Management
  • Inventory & Warehouse Management
  • Sales & Order Management
  • Manufacturing & Production
  • Supply Chain Management
  • Job Costing
  • Planning & Scheduling
  • Ability to translate business requirements into technical ERP solutions.

Preferred Skills

  • Experience in finance, trading, and manufacturing ERP implementations.
  • Experience with third-party integrations.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving capabilities.
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.

Educational Qualification

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field.

What We Expect

  • Strong ownership mindset.
  • Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
  • Effective communication with functional and business teams.
  • Capacity to handle multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.
  • Passion for solving business problems through ERP technology.

Contact: Share your updated resume at careers@thomsuninfocare.com.
summary: Seeking an experienced Epicor Developer with 3-5 years of expertise in ERP customization, C#/.NET, and REST API integrations. Must collaborate with teams to implement scalable solutions and optimize ERP performance.

job_description:
Job Summary

We are seeking a detail-oriented Data Engineer/Analyst with a strong background in e-commerce to join our team for a client engagement. The ideal candidate will bring an investigative mindset, with the ability to assess current data flows, identify gaps, and drive improvements from the ground up. This role requires someone who can audit existing systems, ask the right questions, and ensure data accuracy by tracing issues to their source, while collaborating across teams to build reliable and scalable data solutions.

Key Responsibilities

  • Conduct a comprehensive assessment of existing data flows, pipelines, and reporting systems within the client’s e-commerce ecosystem. Identify data gaps, inconsistencies, and root-cause issues, and recommend strategic improvements.
  • Design and implement scalable data models, pipelines, and reporting frameworks aligned with business needs.
  • Integrate and unify data across multiple systems, including ERP, storefronts, shipping, and accounting platforms.
  • Develop intuitive dashboards and reports to support decision-making for business and operational teams.
  • Establish robust data validation processes and governance standards to ensure accuracy and consistency.
  • Automate reporting workflows and implement scheduled data pipelines for efficiency and scalability.
  • Collaborate cross-functionally with operations, finance, fulfillment, and development teams to align data initiatives.
  • Analyze system logic and backend processes to validate data accuracy at the source.
  • Provide actionable insights and proactively highlight trends, anomalies, and risks.
  • Assist in hiring, training, and supervising team members as per client policies.

Qualifications and Skills

  • 3 - 6 years of experience in data engineering, data analysis, or related roles.
  • Strong understanding of e-commerce and ERP data structures, including orders, inventory, fulfillment, and pricing models.
  • Advanced proficiency in SQL and experience working with relational databases (MySQL preferred).
  • Experience with BI tools such as PowerBI (preferred), Tableau, or Looker.
  • Proficiency in Python or similar scripting languages for data processing and automation.
  • Familiarity with ETL tools or pipeline frameworks (e.g., Airflow, dbt) is an advantage.
  • Ability to read and interpret backend code (e.g., Python, Node.js, PHP) to understand data generation and transformations.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a focus on data integrity and reliability.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English.
  • Ability to manage priorities effectively in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.

What We’re Looking For

  • A professional with a strong investigative mindset who can evaluate data systems objectively and challenge assumptions.
  • Someone who focuses on addressing root causes rather than surface-level fixes.
  • A proactive individual who takes ownership and asks the right questions before implementing solutions.
  • A detail-oriented expert with a high standard for data accuracy and quality.
  • A collaborative team player who can effectively engage with both technical and business stakeholders.

Contact

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at india.hr@redux.co.
summary: Seeking a Data Engineer/Analyst to assess e-commerce data systems, design scalable solutions, and ensure data accuracy through collaboration with cross-functional teams.

About the Job

As a specialist in electronics and software for the past 20 years, in-tech is a dynamic, fast-growing engineering company headquartered in Munich, Germany, with approximately 2,350 employees globally across 20 project locations in 8 countries. in-tech develops innovative engineering solutions for the automotive, rail, aerospace, defence, and industrial sectors.

We are committed to a flexible, modern work culture and work-life balance. Our colour orange symbolizes liveliness, warmth, and dynamism. We value a strong team spirit, fresh ideas, and a positive work culture—what we call the Orange Spirit!

Since 2024, in-tech has become a subsidiary of Infosys Ltd, enhancing our ability to deliver comprehensive development and digitalisation services with greater offshore capabilities.

We are seeking an experienced HR Development Specialist to join our team in Kochi, India, with hybrid work options. If you’re passionate about joining a growing, dynamic team in a company with a positive culture and team spirit, we’d love to connect with you!

Responsibilities

  • Design, implement, and continuously improve international HR development strategies aligned with in-tech’s global objectives.
  • Collaborate with regional HR teams to ensure consistency and effectiveness of development programs.
  • Plan, coordinate, and steer global developmental processes (talent management, succession planning, leadership development, performance management).
  • Monitor and evaluate development initiatives, providing improvement recommendations.
  • Administer the in-tech Training Academy (curriculum development, scheduling, logistics).
  • Identify training needs, source internal/external trainers, and ensure high-quality learning program delivery.
  • Track participation and outcomes, reporting on ROI and impact.
  • Act as a liaison between global HR, business leaders, and employees to meet developmental needs.
  • Build relationships with internal/external partners to enhance learning opportunities.
  • Stay current with global HR trends and integrate innovative approaches into programs.
  • Support change management initiatives related to HR development.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s or master’s degree in HR, Business Administration, or related field.
  • Minimum 6+ years of experience required.
  • Proven experience in international HR development, preferably in a technology-driven environment.
  • Strong project management and organizational skills.
  • Excellent communication and intercultural competence.
  • Experience with learning management systems and training program administration.
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a global, matrixed organization.
  • Fluency in English; additional languages are a plus.

Apply with Us

If you have experience and team spirit and seek a great workplace, start your journey with us. in-tech is committed to equal employment opportunity and diversity.

Contact: Share your updated resume at india.talent@in-tech.com.

Address: 14th FLOOR, CARNIVAL TECHNOPARK, TECHNOPARK CAMPUS, KARIYAVATTOM P.O., TRIVANDRUM , 695581 Website: https://www.mptglobal.com Contact Email: divya.knair@muthoot.com

Gen AI/AI/ML ENGINEER

Closing Date: 30, June 2026 Job Published: 18, May 2026 Experience: 3-12 Years Location: Koramangala, Bangalore/ Technopark, Trivandrum Employment Type: Full-Time

About the Role

We are seeking a Python Developer with strong backend engineering expertise and hands-on exposure to Generative AI, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning to design, build, and scale AI-driven applications. The role involves developing production-grade AI solutions leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs), deep learning models, and cloud AI services across cloud or on-premises environments.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and integrate LLM-based solutions (e.g., OpenAI GPT, LLaMA, HuggingFace models) into enterprise products and workflows
  • Implement Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), prompt engineering, embeddings, chunking strategies, and fine-tuning for business use cases
  • Develop APIs and integration layers to seamlessly connect AI models with frontend and backend systems
  • Build and maintain scalable backend applications using Python with microservices architecture
  • Design and implement RESTful APIs using frameworks such as FastAPI (mandatory), Flask, or Django
  • Develop Agentic AI workflows including multi-agent coordination, tool/function calling, memory handling, and workflow orchestration
  • Integrate AI models into applications using APIs and ensure secure and efficient communication across systems
  • Collaborate effectively with frontend (Flutter) and backend (Node.js/Python) teams for smooth AI feature deployment
  • Test, debug, and manage API integrations using tools like cURL and other debugging mechanisms
  • Build and deploy AI services on cloud platforms using AWS services such as Lambda, S3, API Gateway, EC2, ECS/EKS, DynamoDB, and RDS
  • Leverage Amazon Bedrock and SageMaker for model deployment, orchestration, and scaling
  • Develop and integrate machine learning and deep learning models using frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, and scikit-learn
  • Work on NLP, classification, regression, clustering, anomaly detection, and time-series modeling problems
  • Build scalable data pipelines for data processing, training, validation, and inference
  • Ensure systems are secure, scalable, cost-optimized, and production-ready with proper monitoring and observability
  • Implement DevOps and MLOps best practices including CI/CD, model versioning, logging, and performance tracking
  • Collaborate with product teams and stakeholders to translate business requirements into AI-driven solutions
  • Contribute to architecture design, innovation, and continuous improvement of AI platforms

Required Technical Skills

LLM & AI Integration (Mandatory – Hands-on) - Strong hands-on experience working with LLMs and Generative AI systems - Experience integrating LLMs such as OpenAI GPT, LLaMA, HuggingFace models into real-world applications - Experience with frameworks such as LangChain, LlamaIndex, LangGraph, ADK, or similar - Hands-on experience with vector databases such as Pinecone, Weaviate, Milvus, FAISS, or OpenSearch - Proven ability to build and deploy RAG pipelines, embeddings-based retrieval systems, and prompt engineering workflows - Experience integrating AI models via APIs into live production systems

Programming & Frameworks - Strong proficiency in Python for backend development, data processing, and AI/ML integration - Experience with FastAPI (mandatory), Flask, or Django for API development - Basic to intermediate understanding of Node.js for backend integration and collaboration - Basic understanding of Flutter to support frontend integration of AI APIs - Familiarity with cURL for testing, debugging, and managing API requests and responses

Machine Learning & Deep Learning - Solid understanding of machine learning and deep learning concepts - Hands-on experience with frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras, or scikit-learn - Experience in NLP, neural networks, and modern AI architectures - Ability to train, validate, optimize, and deploy ML/DL models

Data & Database Technologies - Experience with relational databases such as PostgreSQL or MySQL - Experience with NoSQL and vector databases such as MongoDB, Pinecone, or OpenSearch - Knowledge of data processing tools such as Pandas and NumPy - Familiarity with big data tools such as Spark or Hadoop (optional)

Cloud & DevOps - Experience working with AWS cloud services including Lambda, S3, API Gateway, EC2, ECS/EKS, DynamoDB, and RDS - Knowledge of Amazon Bedrock and SageMaker is preferred - Experience with Docker and Kubernetes for containerization and orchestration - Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices - Understanding of IAM, VPC, encryption, and secure system design

Summary

This role requires a strong foundation in Python backend development combined with hands-on experience in Generative AI, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning. The candidate should be capable of building scalable, production-ready AI systems, integrating advanced models, and enabling intelligent automation across enterprise workflows.

Preferred Skills

Professional and Technical Skills - Strong understanding of microservices architecture and distributed systems - Expertise in API design, software architecture, and scalable system design - Strong problem-solving, analytical thinking, and debugging skills - Ability to design, build, test, deploy, and operate AI-powered systems end-to-end - Experience in performance optimization, scalability, latency, and cost trade-offs - Good communication skills with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to cross-functional teams - Ability to assess existing processes, identify improvement areas, and suggest AI-driven solutions - Awareness of latest technologies and industry trends

Good to Have

  • Experience with advanced Agentic AI systems and workflow automation
  • Knowledge of Graph RAG and knowledge graph-based retrieval systems
  • Experience in prompt optimization, LLM fine-tuning, and model evaluation
  • Experience deploying AI/ML/GenAI solutions into production environments
  • Exposure to multiple cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP
  • Familiarity with financial or enterprise domain systems
  • Experience with distributed systems, Snowflake, or large-scale data platforms
summary: A GenAI/AI/ML Engineer with Python backend expertise to build scalable AI systems, integrate advanced models, and enable intelligent automation across enterprise workflows.

Company: Muthoot Pappachan Technologies Ltd Location: Trivandrum, Kerala Contact Email: divya.knair@muthoot.com Closing Date: 30 June 2026 Job Published: 18 May 2026

Job Summary

The Oracle Database Administrator (Cloud) manages, secures, and optimizes Oracle databases in cloud and hybrid environments, with a focus on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI). Responsibilities include ensuring high availability, performance, scalability, security, and cost efficiency for mission-critical applications.

Key Responsibilities

  • Cloud Database Administration (OCI-Focused)
  • Provision, configure, and manage Oracle Databases on OCI (Autonomous Database, DBCS, Exadata Cloud).
  • Manage Single Instance, RAC, CDB/PDB architectures in cloud environments.

  • Perform lifecycle management: provisioning, scaling, cloning, patching, and decommissioning.

  • Hybrid & Migration Responsibilities

  • Support hybrid environments (on-prem + OCI).
  • Plan and execute cloud migrations using RMAN, Data Pump, OCI Database Migration Service, and Goldengate.

  • Validate post-migration performance and functionality.

  • High Availability, DR & Resilience

  • Design and manage OCI Data Guard, automated backups, cross-region disaster recovery.

  • Conduct recovery testing, DR drills, and rolling upgrades with minimal downtime.

  • Performance & Cost Optimization

  • Monitor and tune databases using OCI Console, AWR/ADDM/ASH, and OCI Monitoring.

  • Optimize storage, compute shapes, licensing, and implement cost-aware architectures (FinOps).

  • Security, Compliance & Governance

  • Implement cloud security best practices (IAM, VCNs, encryption).

  • Manage access controls, auditing, and compliance (ISO, SOX, GDPR).

  • Automation & DevOps Enablement

  • Automate operations using Shell scripting, SQL/PLSQL, OCI CLI/SDK, Terraform/Ansible.

  • Integrate database changes into CI/CD pipelines and support IaC.

  • Monitoring & Operations

  • Set up proactive monitoring, alerts, and dashboards.

  • Troubleshoot cloud-specific issues and participate in 24x7 on-call rotations.

  • Documentation & Collaboration

  • Maintain architecture diagrams and runbooks.
  • Collaborate with cloud architects, DevOps engineers, application teams, and security teams.

Education & Certifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in computer science/IT.
  • Preferred certifications: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) Architect/DBA, Oracle Certified Professional (OCP), Exadata/Performance/Security certifications.

Soft Skills

  • Cloud troubleshooting mindset, automation-first approach.
  • Clear communication, fast-paced environment adaptability, ownership of production systems.

Experience Levels

  • Mid-Level: 3–5 years (1–2 years cloud exposure).

About MPT

Muthoot Pappachan Technologies (MPT) is a subsidiary of the Muthoot Pappachan Group, providing cutting-edge IT solutions including cloud, ERP, application development, and infrastructure management. Based at Technopark, Trivandrum, MPT serves both internal and external clients with innovative technology services.

Required Skills

  • Technical Skills: Oracle Database (12c/18c/19c/21c), RMAN, Data Guard, ASM, RAC, Multitenant (CDB/PDB), SQL/PLSQL, Linux administration, performance tuning.
  • Cloud-Specific Skills: OCI IAM/networking/storage, Autonomous Database, cloud security, cost optimization, IaC tools (Terraform), monitoring/logging in OCI.
  • Preferred Skills: Oracle Golden Gate, Exadata Cloud, multi-cloud exposure (AWS/Azure), Kubernetes, ITIL/SRE, DevSecOps.
summary: Oracle DBA (Cloud) manages and optimizes databases in OCI environments, ensuring high availability, security, and cost efficiency. Requires 3–5 years of experience with cloud exposure.
